articles.title_en: Ukrainians protest and Z-bloggers celebrate after Zelensky fires the defense minister who cut Russia off from Starlink and flooded the front with drones
articles.lead_en: On the evening of July 15, news broke that Ukrainian Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov would be dismissed from the post he had held since January. Ukraine’s parliament, the Verkhovna Rada, has yet to formally approve his removal.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainians protest and Z-bloggers celebrate after Zelensky fires the defense minister who cut Russia off from Starlink and flooded the front with drones
articles.lead_raw: On the evening of July 15, news broke that Ukrainian Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov would be dismissed from the post he had held since January. Ukraine’s parliament, the Verkhovna Rada, has yet to formally approve his removal.

articles.title_en: A fire in a residential building was extinguished in Astrakhan
articles.lead_en: One person died, the Russian Emergency Situations Ministry reported.
articles.title_raw: В Астрахани потушили пожар в жилом доме
articles.lead_raw: Один человек погиб, сообщили в ГУ МЧС России

articles.title_en: One civilian killed, several injured as air defenses down 375 drones over Russia
articles.lead_en: The Ukrainian UAVs were shot down over 19 Russian regions
articles.title_raw: One civilian killed, several injured as air defenses down 375 drones over Russia
articles.lead_raw: The Ukrainian UAVs were shot down over 19 Russian regions
